title: Name/secure the Data-License+Privacy reviewer (blocking gate role)
context: The Data-License+Privacy reviewer is a mandatory, non-skippable gatekeeper for every model card: no card ships without their sign-off. Until this role is named and filled, all tasks remain verifiedNeed:false and no model can pass the cancer-data gate. This blocking role must be filled before the M0 pilot review. Without a named reviewer, triage halts.
objective: Identify and secure at least one qualified Data-License+Privacy reviewer who will serve as the non-skippable gatekeeper for license and de-identification verification on all model-card tasks; record the named reviewer(s) and their agreement to fill this role.
acceptanceCriteria: At least one named, qualified Data-License+Privacy reviewer is confirmed and has agreed to serve in the gatekeeper role.
The reviewer's name, affiliation, and contact method are recorded in a committed document.

The reviewer understands and accepts the gate criteria: confirming that every model artifact and every training/eval dataset is appropriately licensed (permitsDerivatives/permitsUse=true with cited clause/URL) and that all data is open/aggregate/de-identified with no controlled-access or identifiable data.
A rotation plan or backup reviewer is documented to ensure the role is never vacant (triage halts if no named reviewer exists).
The outcome document is committed to the project repo.
output: A committed document recording the named Data-License+Privacy reviewer(s), their agreement to the role, and a rotation/backup plan.
